_comment: Bundled minigame catalogue. The ORDER is stable and authoritative: a data cube's seed is mapped to a game by index (seed mod games.length), so reordering changes which cube grants which game. The server never reads this file — it only places cubes with seeds; the client resolves seed -> game here. Games are NOT user-moddable; add a game by dropping a folder under minigames/<key>/ and appending an entry here.

desc.en: Steer the data-serpent, swallow energy nodes and grow. Don't bite your own tail or hit the wall.
desc.de: Steuere die Datenschlange, friss Energieknoten und wachse. Beiße nicht in deinen Schwanz und meide die Wand.

desc.en: Slide and merge matching tiles to reach 2048. A quiet number puzzle for the long haul between stars.
desc.de: Schiebe und verschmelze gleiche Kacheln bis 2048. Ein ruhiges Zahlenrätsel für die lange Reise zwischen den Sternen.

desc.en: Flip the glyph cards two at a time and find every matching pair in as few moves as you can.
desc.de: Drehe die Glyphen-Karten paarweise um und finde alle Paare mit möglichst wenigen Zügen.

desc.en: Bounce the core off your paddle to shatter every block. Clear the field before you run out of cores.
desc.de: Lenke den Kern mit dem Schläger und zertrümmere jeden Block. Räume das Feld, bevor die Kerne ausgehen.
